ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum) */,
  "current_price" TEXT /* Current market price in USD */,
  "change_1h" TEXT /* Percentage change over the last hour */,
  "change_24h" TEXT /* Percentage change over the last 24 hours */,
  "change_7d" TEXT /* Percentage change over the last 7 days */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Total amount of cryptocurrency in circulation */,
  "blockchain_platform" TEXT /* Blockchain platform on which the cryptocurrency operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last user login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of cryptocurrency owned */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price at which the cryptocurrency was purchased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the transaction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of cryptocurrency transacted */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Transaction fee */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the cryptocurrency at a specific time */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price was recorded */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume at the time of the price record */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization at the time of the price record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Price threshold for the alert to trigger */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the alert is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, trader) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., can_trade, can_view_reports) */,
  "is_granted" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the permission is granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., account_update, trade_execution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Encrypted token for session identification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session expires */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time of the last session activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volume" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume at a specific time */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the volume was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volume_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, trade) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
